archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Modern B2B Tech / Vercel Style)
vibe: Professional, precise, highly performant, trustworthy. No violet or teal gradients. Emphasizes clean lines, dense data displays, and a nod to WhatsApp branding through crisp green accents.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tighter leading-tight

dashboard.layout_style: Control Room Grid (Dense, rigid, highly functional)

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E5E7EB on almost all structural elements to create a blueprint/technical feel. Avoid heavy drop shadows.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-md (6px) or rounded-sm (4px) to maintain a sharp, technical aesthetic. Avoid pill shapes or heavily rounded cards.
visual_enhancers.background_textures: Use subtle blueprint grids for marketing sections: bg-[linear-gradient(to_right,#80808012_1px,transparent_1px),linear-gradient(to_bottom,#80808012_1px,transparent_1px)] bg-[size:24px_24px]
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Only for sticky headers or floating toolbars: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-gray-200.

components_strategy.buttons: Flat design. Primary buttons use brand_primary (#16A34A). Secondary buttons use transparent background with border. No thick gradients.
components_strategy.inputs: Clean 1px borders, white background. Focus state: ring-2 ring-green-500/20 border-green-500. No heavy shadows.
components_strategy.cards: Flat surfaces with 1px border. On dashboard, they must snap perfectly to the grid with no irregular heights.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Use Line Charts for message volume, Bar Charts for delivery rates, Donut charts for message status (Sent/Delivered/Read). Use Brand Green as primary data color.
components_strategy.tables: Dense rows for CRM/Leads and Campaigns. 13px or 14px font size. Sticky headers. Pagination.
components_strategy.chat_console: 3-pane layout. Left: Conversation list (dense, selectable). Center: Chat window with WhatsApp-style bubbles (Green for outgoing, Gray for incoming). Right: AI Suggestions and CRM data context.

image_urls.description: Modern office team working. Use with a heavy overlay (e.g., bg-white/90) as a subtle background for the marketing hero section, or as a feature image in the 'About' or 'Enterprise' block.
Two colleagues collaborating. Perfect for illustrating CRM team access or Live Chat features on the marketing page.
Team at desks. Good for '24/7 Support' or 'Built for scale' sections.
Apple logo. Use creatively as an integration placeholder if needed, or stick to pure CSS/Lucide icons for platforms like Shopify, Salesforce, etc.

pages_and_features: 1. Marketing Landing Page (Hero, Value Prop, Blueprint Grid Features, Pricing, Footer)
4. Overview Metrics (Charts, KPIs for messages sent, delivered, read)
5. WhatsApp Setup (BYOC credentials, QR/Token entry, Connection Status)
6. Campaigns (List, Create Bulk Campaign, Audience Selection, Scheduling, Progress)
7. Leads / CRM (Data table, Filters, Lead Scoring, Tags)
8. Live Chat Console (3-pane layout, WhatsApp style bubbles, AI suggestions sidebar)
10. Integrations & ERP (Webhooks, API key generation, Connected Apps)
11. Subscription / Billing (Plans, Usage bars, Payment History)

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text. Green text/buttons on white background must be legible (use darker #15803D for text).
accessibility_and_testing.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements, forms, and key metric displays (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='metric-messages-sent').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the complete UI with mock data to demonstrate full functionality. Ensure navigation works across all 11 defined pages/views.
Strictly adhere to the Vercel/Linear aesthetic: no border-radius above 8px, stark white backgrounds, subtle 1px gray borders, and crisp typography.
Use Phosphor or Lucide icons for high-end technical feel.
For the live chat console, accurately mimic the visual cadence of WhatsApp (green/gray bubbles) but within the crisp B2B SaaS frame.
Implement the 'blueprint grid' background pattern on the marketing page to emphasize the technical nature of the platform.
All complex data tables must use Shadcn Table component and look extremely dense and professional.
